nasb.text: So the king commanded that it should be done so; and an edict was issued in Susa, and Haman’s ten sons were hanged.

esv.text: So the king commanded this to be done. A decree was issued in Susa, and the ten sons of Haman were hanged.

cnv.text: 王就下令這樣行；諭旨傳遍書珊，人就把哈曼的十個兒子掛在木架上。

ccb.text: 王允准了，便在书珊城颁布谕旨，哈曼十个儿子的尸体便被吊了起来。
